goal: Goal2645 RayDB paper-shaped RT-core perf evidence

output_contract.paper_rt_embree: Same RayDB-style rays, triangles, primitive ids, group ids, i64 values, primitive-id deduplication, and grouped reductions as paper_rt_optix.
output_contract.paper_rt_optix: Rows are grouped aggregate rows over the same RayDB-style fixture. Correctness is judged by exact equality with the CPU columnar oracle.
output_contract.rt_core_evidence_required: paper_rt_optix rows must report rt_core_accelerated=true and native_symbol=rtdl_optix_static_triangle_scene_3d_ray_primitive_grouped_i64_reduction.

matrix.claim_boundary: This is the paper-shaped RayDB RT lowering through a generic Embree primitive. Correctness/performance claims require same-contract evidence and review.
This is the paper-shaped RayDB RT lowering through a generic Embree primitive. Correctness/performance claims require same-contract evidence and review.
This is the paper-shaped RayDB RT lowering through a generic Optix primitive. Correctness/performance claims require same-contract evidence and review.
This is the paper-shaped RayDB RT lowering through a generic Optix primitive. Correctness/performance claims require same-contract evidence and review.
